title: ✨ The AI Career Hub is Here! 🚀
message: We've added powerful new AI tools to supercharge your job search and resume building experience. 💼
points: 🤖 AI Resume Chat: Talk directly to your resume to find skill gaps and get tailored advice.
📊 ATS Scanner: Instantly score your resume against real-world Applicant Tracking Systems.
🔥 Daily Challenges: Keep your skills sharp with bite-sized interview and job hunt challenges.
🎨 New Premium Themes: Stand out with 'Cyber Dark' and 'Deep Space' portfolio themes.
⚡ Performance Boost: Faster PDF exports and smoother animations across the app.

title: 🛡️ Critical Security & Stability Update
message: This update includes vital bug fixes for saving templates and ensures your data syncs perfectly.
points: 🐛 Fixed a crash occurring on older Android devices when exporting to PDF.
🔒 Enhanced privacy and security protocols for user data.
